---
title: "Leaves (%) Across Years"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

This page summarizes the **Leaves** phenophase intensity (interpreted as “% leaves”) across years.


```{r}
library(phenofit)
library(data.table)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)
library(tidyverse)

library(targets)
tar_load(d)

# take mean intensity for each day to prevent duplicates

d <- d |>
    filter(phenophase_description=="Leaves")|>
    group_by(common_name, genus, species,observation_date)|>
    summarize(intensity=mean(intensity,na.rm=T))|>
    arrange(species,observation_date)


# Example: estimate phenology for each species
species_list <- unique(d$species)#[9]


results <- map(species_list, function(sp) {
	# sp=species_list[4]#"nigra"
	d_sp <- d[d$species == sp & !is.nan(d$intensity), ]
	d_sp$y <- d_sp$intensity
	d_sp$t <- as.Date(d_sp$observation_date)
	d_sp$w <- 1

	# Add head/tail for robust smoothing
#   dnew <- add_HeadTail(d_sp, south=FALSE, nptperyear=23)
	INPUT <- tryCatch({
		check_input(d_sp$t, d_sp$y, d_sp$w, QC_flag=NULL,
					nptperyear=365, south=FALSE, maxgap=6, alpha=0.02, wmin=0.2)
	}, error = function(e) NULL)
	if (is.null(INPUT) || is.null(INPUT$t) || length(INPUT$t) < 10) {
		return(list(species = sp, pheno = NULL, gof = NULL, fit = NULL, brks = NULL))
	}

	# Segment growing seasons
	brks <- tryCatch({
		season_mov(INPUT,options=list(rFUN = "smooth_wWHIT", iters=30, wFUN = "wBisquare", maxExtendMonth = 6, r_min = 0.1))
	}, error = function(e) NULL)
	if (is.null(brks) || !is.list(brks) || length(brks) == 0) {
		return(list(species = sp, pheno = NULL, gof = NULL, fit = NULL, brks = NULL))
	}

	# Fit multiple curve types
	fit <- tryCatch({
		curvefits(INPUT, brks,
			options = list(
				iters=30,
				methods = c("Gu", "Klos","AG", "Zhang", "Beck", "Elmore"),
				wFUN = wTSM,
				nextend = 2, maxExtendMonth = 3, minExtendMonth = 1, minPercValid = 0.2
			))
	}, error = function(e) NULL)
	if (is.null(fit)) {
		return(list(species = sp, pheno = NULL, gof = NULL, fit = NULL, brks = brks))
	}

	# Extract phenology metrics
	l_pheno <- tryCatch({ get_pheno(fit, IsPlot = FALSE) }, error = function(e) NULL)
	d_gof <- tryCatch({ get_GOF(fit) }, error = function(e) NULL)
	d_fit <- tryCatch({
		fit0 <- get_fitting(fit)
		# Rescale fitted values to 0-100 for each year
		if (!is.null(fit0) && "yhat" %in% names(fit0)) {
			yhat <- fit0$yhat
			rng <- range(yhat, na.rm = TRUE)
			if (diff(rng) > 0) {
				fit0$yhat <- 100 * (yhat - rng[1]) / (rng[2] - rng[1])
			} else {
				fit0$yhat <- 0
			}
		}
		fit0
	}, error = function(e) NULL)
	list(species = sp, pheno = l_pheno, gof = d_gof, fit = d_fit, brks = brks)
})
```


```{r}
d_fit=results[[1]]


# Example: visualize for first species
    last_iter_rough <- colnames(d_fit$fit) %>% last()
    iters_name_fine <- colnames(d_fit$fit) %>% .[grep("ziter", .)] %>% 
        sort()
 
    ggplot(d_fit$fit, aes_string("t", "y", color = "iters")) + 
        geom_vline(data = d_fit$brks$dt, aes(xintercept = beg), 
            size = 0.4, linetype = 2, color = "blue") + 
		geom_vline(data = d_fit$brks$dt, aes(xintercept = end), size = 0.4, linetype = 2, color = "red") + 
#        facet_grid(meth ~ .) + geom_point(data = d_fit$fit, aes_string("t", "y"), 
#                size = .5, alpha = 0.6, color = "grey60")+ 
    	geom_point(aes_string("t", "y"), 
                size = 0.8, alpha = 0.8, color = "grey60")+
#		geom_line(data = d_fit$brks$fit, aes_string("t", last_iter_rough), color = "black", size = 0.8) + 
		geom_line(data = d_fit$fit, aes_string("t", last_iter_rough,group="meth",color="meth"), size = 0.8) #+ 
#		geom_line(aes_string(y = last_iter_rough), size = 0.8,  alpha = 0.7)
    

#r_param <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results, function(x) x$pheno))
#r_pheno <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results, function(x) x$pheno))
#r_gof <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results, function(x) x$gof))
#d_fit <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results, function(x) x$fit))

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(scales)
library(phenofit)
```

```{r load-and-filter}


ds_leaves <- d %>%
	filter(
		kingdom == "Plantae",
		phenophase_description == "Leaves",
		!is.na(intensity),
		between(intensity, 0, 100),
		!is.na(observation_doy),
		!is.na(observation_year)
	) %>%
	mutate(
		observation_year = as.integer(observation_year),
		observation_doy = as.integer(observation_doy),
		common_name = as.factor(common_name)
	)





# Fit double logistic using phenofit for each species-year
fit_doublelogis_species_year <- function(df, year) {
	empty_out <- tibble(
		observation_doy = integer(),
		intensity_fitted = double(),
		observation_date = as.Date(character())
	)
	df_xy <- df %>%
		group_by(observation_doy) %>%
		summarize(y = mean(intensity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
		filter(is.finite(y), !is.na(observation_doy))
	if (nrow(df_xy) < 12) {
		return(empty_out)
	}
	# phenofit expects a time series with regular x (doy) and y (intensity)
	# Fill missing days with NA
	x_grid <- tibble(observation_doy = seq.int(1L, 365L, 1L))
	y_full <- rep(NA_real_, 365)
	valid_idx <- df_xy$observation_doy[df_xy$observation_doy >= 1 & df_xy$observation_doy <= 365]
	y_full[valid_idx] <- df_xy$y[df_xy$observation_doy >= 1 & df_xy$observation_doy <= 365]
	# Fit double logistic using phenofit
	fit <- tryCatch({
		phenofit::curvefit(
			y = y_full,
			t = 1:365,
			tout = 1:365,
			methods = "Zhang"
		)
	}, error = function(e) NULL)
	if (is.null(fit) || is.null(fit$model)) {
		return(empty_out)
	}
	yhat <- tryCatch({
		as.numeric(predict(fit, newdata = list(t = 1:365)))
	}, error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, 365))
	tibble(
		observation_doy = x_grid$observation_doy,
		intensity_fitted = yhat
	) %>%
		filter(is.finite(intensity_fitted)) %>%
		mutate(
			observation_date = as.Date(sprintf("%d-01-01", year)) + (observation_doy - 1L)
		)
}

ds_fits <- ds_leaves %>%
	group_by(common_name, observation_year) %>%
	group_modify(~fit_doublelogis_species_year(.x, year = .y$observation_year)) %>%
	ungroup()
```

## % Leaves by species (all years)

```{r leaves-plot, fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = ds_leaves,
    aes(x = observation_date, y = intensity),
    color = alpha("black", 0.03),
    size = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = ds_fits,
    aes(
      x = observation_date,
      y = intensity_fitted,
      group = interaction(common_name, observation_year)
    ),
    color = "red3",
    alpha = 0.9,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~common_name, ncol = 1) +
  scale_x_date("Date", date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  scale_y_continuous("% Leaves", limits = c(0, 100)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)
  )
```
